name: apply-safe-edits
query: Improve the qa-test skill — fix any safe issues you find, but ask me before anything risky.
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/review-skill-structure.sh BEFORE editing to establish a baseline (pre-edit MISSING/OK counts)
Re-runs scripts/review-skill-structure.sh AFTER editing (workflow step 14 hard gate) and reports post-edit counts
Asks before any change in the Edit-approval list (expanding allowed-tools, deleting files, modifying scripts, renaming, splitting)
Adding a missing required frontmatter field (mode 4 / structural-defect repair) is applied without asking, with the inference recorded in the diagnosis
Final verdict caps at 'Needs minor cleanup' if any of: zero-MISSING fails, evaluation checklist fails, or any subfolder file is dead
